seoTitle: Calimo vs Callaghans Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Calimo and Callaghans Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Calimo vs Callaghans Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Calimo and Callaghans Creek.
heading: Calimo vs Callaghans Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Calimo, New South Wales and Callaghans Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Calimo has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Callaghans Creek (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Calimo or Callaghans Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Calimo has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Callaghans Creek scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Calimo scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Callaghans Creek scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Calimo or Callaghans Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Calimo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
